description: SQLite-backed persistent memory CRUD for intent-specific facts.
routing_examples: Remember that MBR HWY means master hallway
Persist sunset offset for candle lighting as -18 minutes
Show saved aliases for routine automation
router_hints: Use this intent for remember/save/persist/forget operations and events.
Use this intent for memory retrieval when the user is explicitly asking to show, list, recall, retrieve saved information.
Prefer markdown-style entries for human readability.
